tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Semantic recipe search for recommendations, similar meals, what-to-cook questions, and natural-language meal requests based on meaning rather than exact keyword filters. Use for queries like spicy meals, quick dinner after work, healthy lunches, similar meals, or broad recommendations. Continue using search_recipes for explicit ingredient/filter keyword searches.
examples: What should I cook for a quick dinner after work?
Find meals similar to chicken curry

expected_json_output.title: Recipe name
expected_json_output.reason: High semantic similarity between the query and Recipe name.

tools.output_description: Ranked semantic recipe matches with recipeId, title, similarity score, matched text, and deterministic reason.

tools.name: search_recipes
tools.description: Primary recipe discovery tool. Search and filter recipes by ingredients, excluded ingredients, category, tags, cuisine, prep/cook/total time, difficulty, servings, freezer/batch/dietary flags, and optional fuzzy matching.
examples: Find freezer-friendly chicken recipes under 45 minutes
Search vegetarian recipes without dairy sorted by total time
Find spicy Vietnamese pickles or sides
Show 5 high protein recipes with rice but no pork

result_example.name: Chicken Teriyaki
result_example.description: Sweet and savory freezer-friendly chicken with rice.

tools.output_description: Filtered recipe discovery cards with id, name, description, category, tags, prepTime, cookTime, servings, and match metadata. Use the selected recipe id with the recipe-detail tool to fetch steps and full recipe details.

tools.name: plan_weekly_meals
tools.description: Generate a balanced weekly meal plan that respects dietary preferences, excluded ingredients, preparation-time preference, and optional calorie target while avoiding repetition and encouraging freezer-friendly meals.
examples: Plan 7 days with 2 meals per day and no pork
tools.output_description: Day-by-day meal plan with balanced recipe suggestions and planning notes.

tools.name: get_recipe
tools.description: Fetch full recipe details, ingredients, preparation steps, freezer notes, and reheating notes for a recipe selected from search_recipes.
examples: Get the full recipe for chicken-teriyaki
Show recipe steps for Chicken Teriyaki
tools.output_description: Full recipe details for a selected search_recipes card, including ingredients and available preparation steps.

tools.name: replace_meal
tools.description: Replace a meal in an existing meal plan while preserving meal type, dietary restrictions, and preparation constraints, without suggesting the same recipe again.
examples: Replace Tuesday dinner with another freezer-friendly vegetarian meal
tools.output_description: Replacement recipe suggestion with rationale and preserved constraints.

tools.name: optimize_shopping_list
tools.description: Normalize and optimize an existing shopping list by merging duplicate ingredients, combining quantities where possible, grouping by supermarket section, and sorting within sections.
examples: Merge duplicate onions and group my shopping list by section
tools.output_description: Optimized shopping list grouped by supermarket section.

tools.name: batch_cooking_plan
tools.description: Generate an optimized cooking workflow for multiple recipes by grouping similar preparation tasks, minimizing cleaning, reusing equipment, and reducing total cooking time.
examples: Create a batch cooking plan for chili, rice, and salsa chicken

tools.name: convert_servings
tools.description: Scale a recipe up or down, preserving units and rounding ingredient quantities sensibly without losing precision.
tools.output_description: Recipe ingredients scaled to the requested servings.

tools.name: ingredient_substitutions
tools.description: Suggest ingredient substitutions that preserve recipe intent where possible, explaining each suggestion and indicating when no suitable substitution exists.
examples: What can I use instead of tofu?
tools.output_description: Substitution suggestions with rationale and suitability notes.
